name: Chocolate Rum Raisin Mounds
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the raisins in a large plastic food bag.
2. Add the rum to the bag and seal it.
3. Let the mixture soak for 3 hours, allowing the raisins to absorb the liquid.
4. Drain the soaked raisins by placing them in a sieve; do not press down on them.
5. Use the liquid remaining in the fruit compote or serve over ice cream.
6. In the top of a double boiler, combine the chocolate pieces and corn syrup.
7. Place the double boiler over hot (not boiling) water until the chocolate melts, stirring occasionally.
8. Remove from heat and fold in the soaked raisins, coating them well.
9. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto wax paper.
10. Chill until firm. Store in the refrigerator. When packing for gift giving, layer between two pieces of wax paper to prevent sticking.
